title: T-012 — POST /api/scheduler/run endpoint + queue dispatch
prompt:
# T-012 — POST /api/scheduler/run endpoint + queue dispatch

PRD: 07-PLANNING-EXT-PRD.md §8.2 POST /api/scheduler/run, §5.1.1 idempotency, §7.1 FR-07-E1-001
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Implement Next.js Route Handler `POST /api/scheduler/run` that validates body, persists scheduler_runs row (status=queued), dispatches to solver service via Postgres LISTEN/NOTIFY (or BullMQ wrapper), and returns 202 Accepted.

## Implementation contract
1. New route `apps/web/src/app/api/scheduler/run/route.ts`: POST handler reads body { run_id (UUID v7 client), horizon_days (1-30), line_ids (>=1), include_forecast, optimizer_version, run_type='schedule'|'dry_run' }.
2. Zod schema validates body; 400 on shape error; 409 if run_id exists with mismatched params (idempotency conflict per R14).
3. RBAC guard: role IN (Planner Advanced) for schedule, role IN (Planner Advanced, Scheduling Officer) for dry_run.
4. INSERT scheduler_runs row + NOTIFY 'scheduler_solver' channel with run_id; return 202 with estimated_completion_at.
5. Concurrent-run limit: 429 if 3 runs already in (queued|running) for tenant.

## Files
- apps/web/src/app/api/scheduler/run/route.ts [create]
- apps/web/src/lib/scheduler/run-validator.ts [create]
- apps/web/src/lib/scheduler/dispatch.ts [create]
- apps/web/src/app/api/scheduler/run/__tests__/route.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a valid body and Planner Advanced role, when POST /api/scheduler/run runs, then 202 returned, scheduler_runs row created status='queued', NOTIFY emitted
2. Given the same run_id with same params within 1h, when POST repeats, then 200 returned with cached result + cached_from_run_id (idempotent replay per R14)
3. Given role 'Operator', when POST runs, then 403 returned
4. Given 3 in-flight runs for tenant, when 4th POST runs, then 429 returned

## Test strategy
- RED: write apps/web/src/app/api/scheduler/run/__tests__/route.test.ts using vitest + supertest mock for the four ACs
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test scheduler/run/route'

## Risk red lines
- Do not bypass RBAC guard (mandatory per §3.2)
- Do not call solver service synchronously (FR-07-E1-005 requires queue + status poll)
- Do not skip idempotency cache check (R14 contract)

pipeline_inputs.description: Implement POST /api/scheduler/run with Zod validation, RBAC guard, idempotency check, NOTIFY-based dispatch, concurrent-run limit.
pipeline_inputs.details: Route handler validates body via Zod, enforces RBAC (Planner Advanced for schedule), checks idempotency (run_id within 1h returns cached), enforces 3-concurrent-runs limit (429), inserts scheduler_runs row, NOTIFYs solver channel. Returns 202 Accepted with estimated_completion_at. Runs in Server Action pattern with Drizzle DB session bound to tenant_id.
out_of_scope: Do not implement solver algorithm here (T-022, T-023)
Do not implement Python solver service here (T-021)
Do not implement status polling here (T-013)
